title: Redesign Card.jsx — strip double-bezel, solid bg, 1px border, zero radius, ASCII bracket header
acceptance_criteria: Remove shell/core nesting architecture entirely (shellBase, coreBase objects, card-doppelrand classes)
Card renders as a single flat div: solid var(--color-surface) bg, 1px solid var(--color-hairline) border
border-radius: 0 everywhere — no SHELL_RADIUS, no CORE_RADIUS
No box-shadow or inset shadow on shell or core
No backdrop-filter or blur on any variant
Variant system simplified: default = surface bg, elevated = surface-elevated bg
CardHeader: ASCII bracket prefix — render `[ TITLE ]` in mono, uppercase format
CardDescription: muted text, no changes needed beyond font
Interactive variant: cursor pointer, border-color changes to hairline-hover on hover
No transform animations on hover (no translateY, no scale)
